label: Damage armor category
description: Defines an armor category used to resolve which stat governs armor penetration and resistance for a given damage type. The three shipped categories are Sharp, Blunt, and Heat.

multStat.label: Mult stat
multStat.description: StatDef used to multiply outgoing damage of this armor category (e.g. ArmorPenetration_Sharp).

armorRatingStat.label: Armor rating stat
armorRatingStat.description: StatDef that holds the pawn or thing armor rating for this category (e.g. ArmorRating_Sharp).
